summary: Tested yellow warning box on /inscricao-passo2.html in mobile (412x915) and desktop (1280x800) viewports for all 5 cargo values requested (1708/1709/1710/1711/1714). All assertions passed.
seed_data_creation: Used localStorage.setItem('cadastroData', {...}) to bypass redirect to /inscricao.html
context_for_next_testing_agent: Verified for ALL 5 cargo values (1708 Aux Turma, 1709 Apoio, 1710 Especialista, 1711 Prof Básica, 1714 Educação Física): #avisoRequisitoCargo display=block, bg=rgb(255,248,196), border=rgb(242,199,121) 1px, p element computed display=flex, align-items=flex-start, gap=10px. Icon ⚠️ left=39 (mobile)/193 (desktop), strong text left=74/228 — icon is clearly to the LEFT of text with proper gap, NOT embedded in middle. Icon top equals strong top (perfect baseline alignment). On deselect to placeholder, #avisoRequisitoCargo returns to display=none. Regression OK: #blocoLocalidadeVaga shows display=block with 10 options (1 placeholder + 9 LOCALIDADES_PADRAO). Note: LOCALIDADES_PADRAO has 9 entries in code, not 20 as stated in request — flag for main agent if more polos expected.
rca of the issue: Original bug: aviso.innerHTML rendered ⚠️ inline before , so when text wrapped to 2 lines, the icon appeared inserted between lines. Fix uses inline-style flexbox p (display:flex; align-items:flex-start; gap:10px) with separate ⚠️ and {text} so the icon stays fixed at top-left while text wraps in the right column. Verified by getBoundingClientRect: iconRight (64) <= strongLeft (74) on mobile, confirming horizontal layout. Bug is FIXED.
